# Competitor Analysis Template

## Purpose
This template helps you systematically research and analyze competitors' social media presence to identify opportunities, threats, and best practices for your own strategy.

**Instructions:**
1. Identify 3-5 direct and indirect competitors
2. Analyze each competitor across all relevant platforms
3. Update analysis quarterly to track changes
4. Use insights to inform your content strategy and positioning

---

---

### Positioning Map

```
HIGH ENGAGEMENT
      |
      |        Competitor X
      |            
      |    Our Brand
      |              
      |                    Competitor Y
      |        Competitor Z
      |
      +------------------------- HIGH FOLLOWERS
LOW ENGAGEMENT
```

*Map competitors based on engagement rate vs. follower count, or other relevant dimensions*

## MONITORING PLAN

### Quarterly Review Checklist

- [ ] Review any new campaigns or strategies
- [ ] Assess changes in engagement rates
- [ ] Identify new threats or opportunities
- [ ] Update positioning matrix
